name: Case Study
description: Before/after story with measurable results. Concrete numbers build authority.

variables.name: title
variables.description: Attention-grabbing title with a metric — first 210 chars before 'see more'. E.g. 'How we increased X by 200%'

variables.name: results
variables.description: Measurable outcomes with numbers and percentages

variables.name: takeaway
variables.description: Key lesson or question. E.g. 'What metrics matter most to you?'

tips: Concrete numbers (revenue, %, time saved) make case studies believable
Tag the client if they're OK with it — their comment boosts reach
NO links to the full case study in post — add in comment after 15 min
